subject: [PATCH v6 16/22] swap: do not unnecessarily pin readahead swap entries

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch optimizes swap readahead by avoiding unnecessary pinning of swap entries in the same virtual swap cluster as the target entry. The patch introduces a new function `vswap_same_cluster` to check if two virtual swap entries belong to the same cluster, and uses this function to skip pinning entries that are already protected by the pinned target entry. This reduces overhead and improves performance.
